title: kobe theme
description: Color theme for the kobe TUI. Drop the file at ~/.kobe/themes/<name>.json (or run `kobe theme add <url>`). See packages/kobe/src/tui/context/theme/claude.json for a canonical example with defs + dark/light variants.

$schema.description: Optional pointer back to this schema for editor autocomplete.

defs.description: Optional palette of named colors that `theme` entries can reference (e.g. `darkPrimary -> #cc785c`). Values are hex strings or refs to other defs.

theme.description: Map of slot name to color value. Slot values are: a hex string (`#abc`, `#aabbcc`, `#aabbccdd`), a bare string referencing a key in `defs`, or a `{ dark, light }` variant pair.

oneOf.description: Hex color (`#abc` / `#aabbcc` / `#aabbccdd`) or a reference to a `defs` key.
Dark/light variant pair. Both fields are required.
